goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'sesame restaurant and bar'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '1 people' at '12:00' on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'birmingham new street' and should 'arrive by 09:00'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called sesame restaurant and bar
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 1 people at 12:00 on tuesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to birmingham new street and should arrive by 09:00
The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
